tech_news.description: Xona aims to deploy 258 satellites into low-Earth orbit as a GPS alternative.

tech_news.title: OnePlus, the ‘Flagship-Killer’ Smartphone Brand, Is All but Dead - WIRED
tech_news.description: The original OnePlus phone disrupted the mobile market 13 years ago with its affordable price and top-end specs. Now, the company is exiting North America and Europe to focus on China.
